reason: Verified that the agent can successfully open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title "Example Domain", and report it back in the chat response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Gamut application showing the agent list.
Found and clicked on the "QA-20260626-003832-oaav" agent in the sidebar — Successfully opened the agent's chat interface.
Typed and sent the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was sent and agent began processing.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Response was received in 12 seconds with the agent completing the task.

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — The agent's response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." and "Done — the page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain". Browser closed."
